user.title: Configure the gasoil estimator
user.description: Select the cumulative energy sensor (kWh) of your boiler and, optionally, the initial tank data.

init.title: Gasoil estimator options
init.description: Adjust the energy sensor, name, tank capacity, initial ratio and meter rollover.

add_manual_reading.name: Add manual gasoil reading
add_manual_reading.description: Records the liters shown by the gasoil meter at a given time and recalibrates the estimation.

liters.name: Liters
liters.description: Total cumulative liters shown by the gasoil meter.

timestamp.name: Date and time
timestamp.description: Time of the reading. If omitted, the current time is used. If in the past, the energy sensor history is queried.

config_entry_id.name: Instance
config_entry_id.description: Estimator instance. Optional if only one is configured.

reset_calibration.name: Reset calibration
reset_calibration.description: Clears all manual readings and resets the ratio to the initial value.

config_entry_id.name: Instance
config_entry_id.description: Estimator instance to reset. Optional if only one is configured.
